body:
I think we have put the cart before the horse in adding more complicated time-stepping schemes (multi-rate and multi-step) for tracers in ClimaSeaIce.

This is a bit damaging because there is more maintenance burden and we do not even know if we eventually want or need complicated time-stepping schemes or we are ok with simple one-step, one-stage schemes.

Therefore, in this PR I propose to remove RK3 and AB2 in favor of a simple forward Euler. This simplifies the code and allows to design the sea ice model without accounting for complexities that we can address later on. In the end, if we fell like we need more complicated time-stepping schemes, we can add them later.
title: Forward Euler
